---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or improvement to sIfA
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem would this solve?

Frame the request in terms of a real research workflow this would unblock, rather than a technical capability in isolation. For example: *"I cannot show co-authors how their AI use compares to mine before submitting"* rather than *"add a comparison view."*

## What would the feature look like in use?

Walk through how a researcher would experience this. A rough sketch, screenshot, or table mock-up is fine.

## Alternatives considered

Any existing workarounds, or other approaches you considered?

## Is this aligned with sIfA's scope?

sIfA aims to stay a single-file, offline-capable, dependency-light tool. Features that would require a backend, a build step, or new runtime dependencies need a stronger case. If you are unsure, raise the question here and we will discuss before any code is written.

## Anything else?

References, examples from other tools, or related issues.
